'''''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess''''' collects issues 13 through 16 from the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' series of comics. It was released [[November 4]], [[1998]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Rogue X-wing pilot Plourr is requested to return to her home planet... as a princess! While attempting to stop an internal rebellion, the planet's government finds that she may have her own way of running things.''

==Contents==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 13|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 13]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 14|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 14]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 15|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 15]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 16|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 16]]
